overview.short: Shri Diggi Kalyan Ji Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu, located in Diggi town of Malpura tehsil, Tonk district, Rajasthan, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Kalyan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Kalyan Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Kalyan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Kalyan Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Kalyan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Kalyan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Kalyan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Kalyan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diggi, Soda, Rajasthan.
